calendar.matters:
HEARING ON ELIJAH WATSON'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar May-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Braden C. Woods
Clerk Danial Lemire
Proceedings reported by FTR commencing at 9:04am and concluding at
Appearing: Elijah Watson

9:17am Hearing commences.
Court has received an updated rapsheet. No objectors present.
Finding good cause the motion is granted.
"Elijah Watson"

Order is signed and filed in open court.

HEARING ON ELIJAH WATSON'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar May-09-2025 Continued To May-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 608
MINI MINUTES: Dept.505; Judge: Branden Woods; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:53:54 a.m. and concluding at 10:06:30 am.(D505)

Re: Request for Name Change

Appearances:
Petitioner Elijah Watson appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.
Herma Breed, fiancee of petitioner as observer.

The court inquires as to how petitioner would like to be addressed.
The Court examines petitioner as to present name and the name they are requesting to change to.
Petitioner offers to the court his birth certificate with his birth name Eli Gregleybut testifies that he has been using Elijah Watson since he moved to California.
Petitioner would like to fly to Texas for a wedding in July and is requesting to expedite the process.
The matter is discussed.

The Court continues the matter for due diligence. The Court has retained a copy of the birth certificate and returned the original birth certificate to Petitioner.

The hearing for the request for change of name is reset to May 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 608 to be heard by Judge Branden Woods.

NOTICE OF HEARING ON ELIJAH WATSON'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Off Calendar
